7:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM
    customers c
JOIN
    yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    PercentageIncrease DESC, PercentageIncrease ASC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
